text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 249 

SRVC_PRVDR_NPPES_TXNMY_CD 

LABEL: Servicing Provider NPPES Taxonomy Code 

DESCRIPTION: The taxonomy code for the provider who treated the recipient. 

SHORT NAME: SRVC_PRVDR_NPPES_TXNMY_CD 

LONG NAME: SRVC_PRVDR_NPPES_TXNMY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 

VALUES: Alphanumeric string 
Ex: 207KA0200X = Allergy Physician
